title: HYCO1, PETROS and PJ Energy Services Announce Strategic Collaboration to Advance COâ‚‚ Utilization and Low-Carbon Development in Malaysia
content: HYCO1 has executed a Joint Collaboration Agreement with Petroleum Sarawak Berhad and PJ Energy Services to advance commercially viable carbon utilization and low-carbon industrial development in Sarawak, Malaysia. Under the agreement, the partners will identify and evaluate opportunities to convert COâ‚‚ emissions into high-value industrial products using HYCO1â€™s patented technology, which combines captured COâ‚‚ with natural gas to produce chemical-grade synthesis gas for downstream use. The technology enables low-carbon syngas production while reducing natural gas consumption by up to 50 percent, helping extend gas reserves, lower production costs, and support low- or near-zero-emissions industrial processes. The collaboration aligns with the Sarawak Gas Roadmap and PETROSâ€™ carbon capture, utilization, and storage initiatives, with a focus on developing localized low-carbon production hubs. HYCO1, PETROS, and PJES will jointly assess multiple investment opportunities through technical and commercial studies aimed at producing low-cost, low-carbon chemicals and fuels, supporting Sarawakâ€™s decarbonization objectives, energy security, and sustainable industrial growth.
author: Analysts Account
